description: Rise of Avalon Patch 1 (19 August 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon/Hellgate Changes, Other Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon / Hellgate Changes
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeons Hellgates food potions swapping minimum distance invader spawn Hunter difficulty IP hardcap softcap 10% 900 Bewildered Heretic Brawler HP Tier 5 6 7

subsections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon / Hellgate Changes
subsections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeons Hellgates food potions distance invader Hunter IP hardcap softcap 900 Bewildered Heretic Brawler 7% HP T5 1519 1413 T6 1806 1680 T7 2253 2097

changes.raw_text: Corrupted Dungeons and Hellgates now allow swapping of food and potions
notes: Corrupted Dungeons and Hellgates now allow swapping of food and potions

changes.raw_text: A minimum distance is now enforced between the owner of a dungeon and an invader's chosen spawn location
notes: A minimum distance is now enforced between the dungeon owner and an invader's chosen spawn location

changes.raw_text: Hunter difficulty IP hardcap has been changed to a softcap (10% effective IP over 900) as intended
notes: Hunter difficulty IP hardcap changed to a softcap (10% effective IP over 900) as intended

changes.raw_text: Decreased HP of Bewildered Heretic Brawler over all tiers by 7%: Tier 5: 1519 → 1413; Tier 6: 1806 → 1680; Tier 7: 2253 → 2097

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Guardians and Aspects are now immune to any forced movement effects like pull or knockback
Pathfinder Great Mage now attacks with an additional spell that not only inflicts damage but also increases all damage done by this Mage by 10% per stack
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Guardians Aspects immune forced movement pull knockback Pathfinder Great Mage additional spell damage 10% per stack

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Zones with World Bosses now spawn resources again as intended
Fixed an issue where enchantment effects did not display on enchanted trees
Fixed an issue where the Marketplace UI could become slow or unstable during searches
Fixed an issue with the new spell cooldown countdown timer where the incorrect number of seconds would sometimes be displayed (actual duration was not affected)
Fixed an issue where players awaiting teleport via Smart Cluster Queue were not immune to crowd control effects
The indication area for the Cursed Skull ability "Haunting Screams" now shows the area and direction of casting as intended
Using the Escape ability to exit a Random Dungeon into an overcrowded cluster now offers alternative spawn cluster (like using an exit would)
Crafting Avalonian Weapons and Offhands now correctly fills corresponding Laborer Journals
Additional graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
